[observation] [info] Add property-based or fuzz tests beside `tests/unit/tools/completion-validation.test.ts` to widen coverage on malformed completions.
[observation] [info] At 0.55 cohesion, formalize a thin interface between `agent/completion.ts` and `validation/index.ts` to keep validation logic independent of agent internals.
[observation] [info] Because coupling to hench core is 0.45, consider memoized adapters so validation can execute in isolation for faster unit tests.
